message:
fix(cx): use timer driver clock for race_timeout instead of wall clock

When a timer driver is available, use its monotonic clock
(TimerDriverHandle::now) for race_timeout deadlines instead of
unconditionally falling back to wall_clock_now(). This ensures
deterministic timeout behavior in test/simulation environments
where the timer driver controls time progression.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
